question: List the names of all customers who live in New York.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE city = 'New York';

question: List the name and price of all products priced above 50.
gold_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE price > 50;

question: List the name and age of customers aged between 30 and 40 (inclusive).
gold_sql: SELECT name, age FROM customers WHERE age >= 30 AND age <= 40;

question: List the name and price of all products, sorted by price from highest to lowest.
gold_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC;

question: List the order_id and order_date of all orders with status 'completed'.
gold_sql: SELECT order_id, order_date FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed';

question: List the name and age of the 3 oldest customers.
gold_sql: SELECT name, age FROM customers ORDER BY age DESC LIMIT 3;

question: List the name and price of all products in the 'Sports' category, sorted by price ascending.
gold_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE category = 'Sports' ORDER BY price ASC;

question: List the name and city of all female customers.
gold_sql: SELECT name, city FROM customers WHERE gender = 'F';

question: Find the name and price of the cheapest product.
gold_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 1;

question: List the order_id and order_date of all orders placed on or after 2024-03-01.
gold_sql: SELECT order_id, order_date FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-03-01';
